SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

Seller: Dr. Amanda Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchid Road, #05-67, Singapore 567890, telephone +65 6123 4567, email: amanda.tan@fictionalmail.sg.

Purchaser: Mr. Jonathan Lim, NRIC No. S3456789C, residing at 456 Jasmine Avenue, #12-34, Singapore 678901, telephone +65 6234 5678, email: jonathan.lim@imaginarymail.sg.

Company: Emerald Ventures Pte. Ltd., UEN: 202312345A, having its registered office at 789 Rosewood Lane, #10-11, Singapore 123456.

Purchase Amount: SGD 1,500,000 (One Million Five Hundred Thousand Singapore Dollars).

The parties agree as follows to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement.
